'''鈭歭-k-s-w''' ('''kalaksewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dubbin|dubbin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dubbin|dubbin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-k-s-w
|-
! Lemma
| kalaksewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilaksewoko|thilaksewoko]] || [[word:jilaksewoko|jilaksewoko]] || [[word:shilaksewoko|shilaksewoko]] || [[word:kilaksewoko|kilaksewoko]]
|-
